texto: There’s a saying that goes something like: ‘We are all one drink or pill away from addiction,’ and I know this is meant to destigmatize what addicts go through, but I feel like I’ve been seeing variations on this ‘common knowledge’ more and more lately being used (on social media) as a cudgel to remind patients to not overdo it,” Anna says, speaking to the dual-edged sword of awareness. A motto designed to humanize the experience of addiction has been turned into a weapon that targets people who rely on opioids for pain management, and that translates to real-world stigma.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a S. E. Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “There’s a saying that goes something like: ‘We are all one drink or pill away from addiction,’ an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, addiction, anti-stigma pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de anti-stigma e chronic-pain.

texto: Opera?" Trelon asked tiredly, "What the hell is opera?" "I'll tell you what it is! It is the screeching of the death birds, that 's what it is!Capturing Cara (Dragon Lords of Valdier, #2)
